name: 鸣潮 穗穗｜金穗潮音
description: Suisui-inspired Codex theme: official folded blue-silver fan motif, gold-ink Shanhe water-realm, dark UI-safe layout, and fan/scroll/seal/water-ripple SVG icons.
author: yanhuuo

sidebar.fontFamily: Microsoft YaHei UI, Segoe UI, sans-serif

source.title: Suisui theme wallpaper generated from official character features
source.process: gold-ink Suisui skill adaptation: water fan, unfolding landscape scroll, Shanhe water-realm, spring tide/rain-dew motifs, dark left Codex UI-safe negative space; icons rebuilt as fan/scroll/ink-seal/water-ripple shapes

sources.process: official folded fan correction: vertical blue-silver folded fan, gold/teal feather ornaments, water-ribbon and Mingting geometry motifs; avoids generic opened paper fan
